prompt:
You are a professional interior designer and architectural visualization artist.

TASK:
Use the uploaded tile image as the ONLY flooring material. Do NOT redesign, recolor, enhance, or modify the tile in any way. Preserve its exact texture, color, finish, pattern, grout spacing, scale, edges, and realism.

Create a luxury, photorealistic modern kitchen interior where this exact tile is installed on the entire floor.

REQUIREMENTS:
- The uploaded tile must cover 100% of the visible kitchen floor.
- Match the tile perspective perfectly with the room perspective.
- Maintain accurate tile dimensions and grout spacing.
- Keep the tile visually identical to the reference image.
- Realistic reflections according to the tile finish (matte, satin, glossy, polished, etc.).
- The floor is the hero of the image. Compose the scene so that 40–60% of the visible image showcases the flooring naturally.

DESIGN STYLE:
Create a premium kitchen suitable for a luxury villa, penthouse, five-star residence, or designer home.

Include:
- Large luxury kitchen island
- Premium quartz or marble countertops
- Soft-close custom cabinetry
- Built-in refrigerator
- Integrated oven and microwave
- Modern induction cooktop
- Designer chimney hood
- Stylish backsplash
- Under-cabinet LED lighting
- Elegant pendant lights above the island
- Premium sink with designer faucet
- Wooden accents
- Floor-to-ceiling storage cabinets
- Large windows with natural daylight
- Indoor plants or fresh herbs
- Minimal luxury décor
- Modern bar stools
- Spacious open-concept layout
- Premium ceiling with recessed and cove lighting

QUALITY:
- Ultra photorealistic
- Architectural visualization quality
- Commercial catalog quality
- Interior magazine quality
- Professional real estate photography
- Hyper realistic materials
- Perfect global illumination
- Physically accurate lighting
- HDR rendering
- Ultra detailed
- 8K resolution

VERY IMPORTANT:
Generate a completely DIFFERENT kitchen every time while preserving the exact uploaded tile.

Randomize:
- Kitchen layout
- Island design
- Cabinet style
- Cabinet color
- Countertop material
- Appliance placement
- Window position
- Wall finishes
- Ceiling design
- Lighting mood
- Decorative accessories
- Indoor plants
- Luxury color palette
- Architectural details

Randomly choose ONE kitchen style:
- Modern Minimalist Kitchen
- Contemporary Luxury Kitchen
- Scandinavian Kitchen
- Italian Luxury Kitchen
- Japandi Kitchen
- Warm Modern Kitchen
- Industrial Luxury Kitchen
- Smart Home Kitchen
- Coastal Luxury Kitchen
- Farmhouse Modern Kitchen
- Luxury Penthouse Kitchen
- High-End Villa Kitchen
- Open Concept Kitchen
- Elegant Dark Kitchen
- Modern Classic Kitchen

Randomly choose ONE camera angle:
- Wide-angle entrance view
- Kitchen island focus
- Corner perspective
- Eye-level architectural shot
- Window-side perspective
- Luxury interior magazine composition
- Professional real estate photography angle
- Floor emphasis shot

Randomly choose ONE lighting condition:
- Bright morning sunlight
- Soft afternoon daylight
- Golden hour
- Warm evening ambience
- Overcast natural lighting
- Premium interior lighting

STRICT RULES:
- Never modify the uploaded tile.
- Never change its color, finish, texture, pattern, or grout.
- Never invent another tile.
- Never stretch or distort the tile.
- Maintain realistic tile scale.
- Ensure cabinets and the kitchen island never hide most of the flooring.
- Keep perspective physically accurate.

NEGATIVE PROMPT:
Do not change the tile appearance.
Do not create blurry or low-quality renders.
Do not generate unrealistic reflections.
Do not distort perspective.
Do not use cartoon, CGI, painting, or illustration styles.
Do not add people.
Do not add text, logos, or watermarks.
Do not duplicate furniture.
Do not create cluttered countertops.
Do not use unrealistic lighting or colors.
